item.title: HKT 推出香港首条人工智能 DCI 高速公路
item.summary: HKT has announced plans to launch its ultra-low-latency 3.2 Tbps AI Data Center Interconnect (DCI) Superhighway service, marking the first deployment of its kind in Hong Kong. This service is designed to provide AI infrastructure providers and institutions with rapid, seamless access to computing resources across multi
